home.hero: Find places to spend sats wherever you are.
home.description: We use {osmLink} to tag places that accept bitcoin and we display those merchants in our beautiful apps.
home.openSource: Our apps and the underlying data are free and open-source.

taggerOnboarding.successMessage: Thanks for your interest in becoming a tagger! We'll review your application and one of the team will be in contact via the email you provided. Contact hello@btcmap.org if you need to follow up.

addLocation.businessOwner: If you're a business owner, please read our
addLocation.heading: Done-for-you
addLocation.description: Fill out the following form and one of our volunteer community members will add your location to the map.
addLocation.tooltip: All additions are completed on a volunteer basis and so we can't guarantee when your location will be added.
addLocation.addressTooltip: All locations are required to have a physical presence. Optionally enter an address here if that makes sense where the merchant is located. Services without locations are not map-able.
addLocation.notesPlaceholder: Please add further details here like additional merchant details, contacts, socials, etc.
addLocation.dataSourceOtherPrompt: How did you verify this information? Please provide as much detail as possible.
addLocation.contactDescription: If we have any follow-up questions we will contact you in order to add this location successfully. To speed up the process please check your spam folder in case it ends up there.
addLocation.supertaggerDescription: Contribute changes directly to OSM - like a 😎 boss. Who needs forms anyway.
addLocation.formSuccessText: We'll review your information and add it ASAP.

formSuccess.monitorProgress: You may also monitor the progress of your submission here:

verifyLocation.hero: Help improve the data for everyone.
verifyLocation.heading: Verify Location
verifyLocation.subheading: (Ensure the information is still accurate and update it otherwise.)
verifyLocation.descriptionPart1: Please fill out the following form and one of our volunteer community members will update your location on the map. Did you know you can update this data yourself on
verifyLocation.tooltip: NOTE: Due to the backlog of requests and the updates being completed on a volunteer effort, it may take several weeks to update this location. It is encouraged to update the location on OpenStreetMap directly if you want to see the changes appear on the map right away.
verifyLocation.currentInfoDescription: Check this box if you have verified the existing data is up-to-date.
verifyLocation.outdatedPlaceholder: Provide what info is incorrect and the updated info on this location
verifyLocation.successMessage: Thanks for taking the time to fill out this report. We'll review your information and update it ASAP.

dashboard.verifiedNote: *Merchants with a survey:date, check_date, or check_date:currency:XBT tag less than one year old.
dashboard.tagsNotePart1: *More information on bitcoin mapping tags can be found

communities.description: Take ownership of your local bitcoin mapping data and help drive adoption. Bitcoin communities are the spark that ignites the movement. Join your friends, onboard businesses and have fun!
communities.leaderboardDescription: Bitcoin mapping communities maintain their local datasets and strive to have the most accurate information. They also help onboard new merchants in their area!

addCommunityForm.heading: Add Community
addCommunityForm.description: Please fill out this form to submit a community application. This is a great way to grow bitcoin adoption in your area, have some fun, and maybe even make some friends along the way.
addCommunityForm.tooltip: NOTE: BTC Map is a free and open source project run by volunteers. Each community application is manually reviewed to ensure quality. It may take a few weeks to have your community added.
addCommunityForm.criteria2: must be a geographical area not a single point
addCommunityForm.criteria3: be willing to take ownership of your local mapping data
addCommunityForm.criteria4: try to onboard new businesses in your area
addCommunityForm.locationHint: Search for an area and select an option from the results.
addCommunityForm.iconHint: We will use the avatar from your social link or the country's flag your community is located in if an icon is not provided.
addCommunityForm.lightningHint: If you want the ability to receive sats you can add either a
addCommunityForm.socialsHint: You need to provide at least one method for people to join your community.
addCommunityForm.contactHint: A way to get in touch with the community leader if we have any questions.
addCommunityForm.notesHint: Is this community part of an organization? Would you like to be associated with a specific language? Etc.
addCommunityForm.successMessage: Thanks for your initiative to create a bitcoin community. We'll review your information and reach out if we need any more details.
addCommunityForm.captchaFetchError: Could not fetch captcha, please try again or contact BTC Map.
addCommunityForm.formSubmitError: Form submission failed, please try again or contact BTC Map.
addCommunityForm.searchError: Could not search for locations, please try again or contact BTC Map.
addCommunityForm.noLocationsWarning: No locations found, please adjust query.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: We do not collect your personal information.
privacyPolicy.readMore: Please read further for more details.

forms.heading: Forms
forms.intro: What happens when you submit a form on our website:
forms.item1: An issue is automatically created in our self-hosted {btcmapDataLink} repo containing the form information.
forms.item2: A message is automatically sent to our {matrixLink}.
forms.item3: If the submission is valid, it is added to {osmLink} by a BTC Map contributor and will appear in our apps.
forms.item4: Some information including communities is not stored on OpenStreetMap but in the BTC Map database instead.
forms.referPolicies: Please refer to the privacy policies of each of these third parties to understand how your information is used there.
forms.agreePublic: By submitting information through one of our forms you are agreeing that this information will be used publicly.
forms.doNotSubmit: Do not submit any personal or private information.
forms.xHandleBefore: If you include an X handle, we may post about your submission from the

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.intro: We use privacy respecting analytics provided by {netlifyLink} and a self-hosted instance of {umamiLink} in order to track usage statistics over time and improve the user experience.
analytics.noCookies: These analytics do not use any cookies or trackers. There is no personally identifiable information included. All of the data is anonymous and complies with the {gdprLink}.
analytics.readMore: Below are some links to read more about Netlify Analytics:

ipProtection.heading: How to Protect Your IP Online
ipProtection.intro: It is good practice to protect your public IP address when surfing the web. The two most common methods to do this are:

changes.heading: Changes to this Privacy Policy
changes.lastUpdated: This privacy policy was last updated: July 10, 2023.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions or feedback about our privacy policy, please contact us at {contactLink} or on any of our social platforms.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: BTC Map is a free and open-source project powered by volunteer bitcoiners and bitcoin-friendly merchants around the world.

merchants.heading: Merchants
merchants.intro: Merchants are at the heart of BTC Map. These businesses are front-running the paradigm change and positioning themselves for continued success. Any merchant who accepts bitcoin can be listed on BTC Map.

supertaggers.heading: Shadowy Supertaggers
supertaggers.intro: Shadowy Supertaggers are people who power this project. They are volunteers who selflessly take the time to update business locations with new information. Without them, BTC Map would not be sustainable!

communities.heading: Communities
communities.intro: Bitcoin communities help drive global adoption by onboarding new users locally!

integrations.heading: Integrations
integrations.reachOut: If you are interested in integrating with us please
